chunks.text: SM/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No. D-5482 of 2021 Mst. Shazia Dilawar Versus The Federation of Pakistan and others ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- BEFORE: Justice Irfan Saadat Khan, Justice Arshad Hussain Khan,JJ 1. For order on office objection. 2. For hearing of CMA No.22969/2021 (Fast Track) 3. For hearing of Main Case. --------- 04.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Irfan Siddiqui, advocate for the petitioner. Syed Hussain Shah, A.A.G. Sindh. Mr. Muhammad Nishat Warsi, D.A.G., a/w Usman Khalid, Account Officer. -.----.---.- Irfan Saadat Khan,J. This petition has been filed on the ground that some appeal has been filed before the Secretary Health, which is pending decision. Learned counsel states that he would be satisfied and would not press this petition, if directions are issued to the Secretary Health to decide the appeal of the petitioner in accordance with law. The DAG and AAG appearing for the respective Respondents have no objection to the same. The instant petition stands disposed of by directing the Secretary Health to decide the appeal/representation filed by the petitioner strictly in accordance with law, after granting opportunity of hearing to either the petitioner or her duly authorized representative, within one month’s time from the date of receipt of this order. With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the listed and pending applications stands disposed of. Let a copy of the present order be sent to the Secretary Health, for information & compliance.

With these directions the instant petition alongwith all the listed and pending applications stands disposed of. Let a copy of the present order be sent to the Secretary Health, for information & compliance. JUDGE JUDGE
